raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I ordered a product from XXXX XXXX using my Barclays American Airlines Card for XXXX. Several weeks in I didnt receive the product and inquired and was told they were having shipping issues. I disputed the charge with Barclays. After several weeks of not receiving the product, I emailed them to cancel the order since I had not received it. I received an email that stated they were going to mail it out again, and I reiterated I do not want the product, but they mailed it any. Two month after I ordered it the product arrived. Barclays closed my dispute siting the product arrived, even though I told them not to send it and it was two months late. However, Barclays told me to try and return it, and if they dont respond to reopen the dispute ( through fax ) and send supporting artifacts to highlight I requested the return, but I havent received a response. Once I didnt receive a response from Rare Supplements I sent the fax to reopen the case with the information requested. Now Barclays closed the dispute again stating I didnt provide the required information, even though I sent them exactly what their management team requested. Now they want me to provide them more information and I am just getting a run around. PLEASE HELP!
